# Science — 2026-06-21

## 🔭 Physics

### Delta paper reports a fixture-only result
**[Journal](https://example.com/delta-paper)** · A. Author et al. · published 2026-06-18
Body paragraph about the delta paper's synthetic finding, purely for fixture purposes.
*Why it matters:* Because the test suite needs a heading-form story with exactly one link in its byline.

### Epsilon heading has no link anywhere in its block
Body paragraph with zero URLs, to confirm anchor.py skips headings lacking any citation.

### Zeta paper's link appears in prose, not the byline
Byline-less lead-in sentence with no link.
The real citation shows up here instead: see [this write-up](https://example.com/zeta-writeup) for details.
*Why it matters:* Confirms the first-URL-in-block rule reaches beyond the byline line.
